sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61113" key="kusodo/xh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῡσο-δόχη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a sort of stocks, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:72" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.72</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
